creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
Hi,

  Please close this PR, the port has already been updated for 4.7a and
soon I'll submit patches for the current 4.7b tarball.

PS: As per Murphy's laws, what I've feared most it happened, the CVS
tree has been "trashed" a bit -- mharo mistakenly imported Akinori's
patches first, creating the safegets.[ch] files, and half an hour later
he removed them after applying the proper patches... Well, that's life.

 Ady (@warpnet.ro)
